message:
fix(columnar): handle infinity in python_mod_f64 (frankenpandas-review-inf01)

The formula `lhs - floor(lhs/rhs) * rhs` produces nan for finite values
modulo infinity because `floor(x/inf) * inf = 0 * inf = nan`.

Fix: Add special-case handling for infinite divisors matching Python/numpy:
- x % +inf = x if x >= 0, else +inf
- x % -inf = x if x <= 0, else -inf
- nan % ±inf = nan

Adds 10 test cases covering all infinity/sign/nan combinations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
